_note: Gate 2 regime allow-list (SHADOW forward-validation). Only the regimes net-positive on BOTH NQ and ES across the full 365d backtest are allowed: RTH_TREND_UP (+$11k NQ / +$5.1k ES) and ETH_TREND_DOWN (+$3k NQ / +$6.1k ES).
